figures.caption: Table 1 Correspondence of subscripts i ↔ (i1, i2, i3) used in vect+1 and vect−1 for tensors in F2×3×5.

Figure 1. Assessment of the runtime performance of the vectorized and tensorized filtering algorithms. In the panels of this figure only one of the sizes M1:3, N varies each time. Dashed lines indicate the theoretically derived asymptotic costs which increase quadratically and linearly for the upper and lower panels, respectively.
